---
title: "Getting Started"
output: rmarkdown::html_vignette
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{Getting Started}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---

```{r, include = FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(collapse = TRUE, comment = "#>")
```

`brainvr.vrcity` loads and analyzes logs from the VR City paradigm.

## Install

```{r eval=FALSE}
# install.packages("remotes")
remotes::install_github("BrainVR/brainvr-vrcity")
library(brainvr.vrcity)
```

## Quick package tour

```{r eval=FALSE}
library(brainvr.vrcity)

# quest names used across helper functions
QUEST_NAMES

# main workflow
# 1) load session
# 2) select tasks
# 3) extract metrics or visualize
```
